MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PAUL PERDUE FOR PLAINTIFF DANIEL WU
SARGE HOLTZMAN FOR DEFENDANT YUE ZHEN WANG. ALSO PRESENT MANDARIN INTERPRETOR - MARY SO

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF 423 BALBOA.
JUDGMENT STAYED. IF DEFENDANT TO VACATES BY 4/21/06 PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT $4000 TO DEFENDANTS ATTORNEY. $2000 TO BE RELEASED IMMEDIATELY TO DEFENDANT. THE BALANCE OF $2000 TO BE RELEASED WHEN THE PREMISES ARE VACATED BY 4/21/06 AND THE KEYS RETURNED. ANY CHECKS THAT PLAINTIFF IS HOLDING WILL BE RETURNED TO DEFENDANTS ATTORNEY WHO WILL RELEASE THE CHECKS IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY 4/21/06.
IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE BY 4/21/06, PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION, DAMAGES AND COSTS.
ANY PAST DUE RENT IS WAIVED. DEFENDANT IS NOT WAIVING ANY CLAIMS AGAINST PLAINITFF.
ALL PARTIES VOIR DIRED AND AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:WILL CHEN ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER: KATHY KOLLEHNER (218)
